store.name: Mansour Shoes

store.name: Mansour Shoes
store.description: A store for sports shoes and shoes for the whole family from leading brands.

hero.title: Welcome to Mansour Shoes
hero.subtitle: Quality shoes for the whole family at affordable prices

seo.defaultTitle: Mansour Shoes - Shoes for the Whole Family

promoPopup.title: Special Offer!
promoPopup.body: Up to 30% off on selected sports shoes. Don't miss out!
